attributes.action: help palestine in war give them aid and rescourses.
attributes.additional_details: I believe that the people in palestine shouldnt have their rights taken away and live a normal life like us living in the uk.
attributes.background: Raise awareness about the people of palestine and raise money for them.

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We're not sure exactly what you'd like the Government or Parliament to do. The UK already provides aid to Palestine. You can find details of this here: https://devtracker.fcdo.gov.uk/programme/GB-GOV-1-400377/summary

We are not sure what your petition asks for that is different from the aid already provided. We are not sure what specific steps you would like the Government to take to raise awareness. 

You could start a new petition explaining clearly what you would like the Government or Parliament to do.
